task_completion.visual_evidence: Android Studio, another IDE, or a file explorer showing the 'NewsReaderApp' project directory open.

task_completion.description: Locate the largest file contributing to the APK size
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'onboarding_deprecated.mp4' visible in the 'app/src/main/assets/' directory, or an APK analyzer/file search tool showing it as a 30MB file.

task_completion.description: Remove the bloat file from the source project
task_completion.visual_evidence: A deletion confirmation dialog for 'onboarding_deprecated.mp4', a terminal 'rm' command targeting the file, or the 'assets' folder shown without the file present.
Android Studio build output, Gradle task execution (e.g., 'assembleDebug' in terminal), or a notification indicating 'APK(s) generated successfully'.

task_completion.description: Verify the final debug APK is under 5MB
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager properties, terminal output (like 'ls -lh' or 'du -h'), or Android Studio APK Analyzer showing the newly built 'app-debug.apk' has a size of less than 5MB (5242880 bytes).

integrity.description: Ensure the file was genuinely deleted from the file system
integrity.visual_evidence: The deletion must occur via the IDE interface, a file manager, or standard terminal commands (rm), not by simply typing 'deleted' in a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the APK was built using the actual build system
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Gradle build logs, Android Studio build progress bars, or standard build tool outputs. The APK should not be a dummy file created with 'touch' or 'dd' to fake the size.

integrity.description: Ensure the APK size verification uses real system tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The size must be displayed by a genuine OS tool (GUI file properties, terminal 'ls -l'/'stat') or Android Studio's APK Analyzer, not a mocked terminal echo or a manually written text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NewsReaderApp. The single largest file causing the bloat is 'onboarding_deprecated.mp4' (exactly 30MB), located in the 'app/src/main/assets/' directory. The agent must delete this specific file and rebuild the APK. The final debug APK must be strictly under 5MB (5242880 bytes).
